title: Auth flow test results
description: 95% of auth flow test cases passing. 3 critical edge cases failing around token refresh.

title: Auth provider incident report
description: Auth provider had 2 outages in March, each lasting 15-30 minutes.

title: Security audit findings
description: Penetration test found no critical vulnerabilities in auth flow. Two medium-severity issues flagged.

title: Load test results — 500 users
description: API handles 500 concurrent users with p95 latency under 200ms. Not yet tested at 1000.

title: Database query performance analysis
description: Verbal estimate that current indexes should support 1000 users. No formal benchmarks.

title: Beta user onboarding survey
description: 8 out of 10 beta users rated onboarding 4+ out of 5. Sample size too small for statistical significance.

title: Competitor onboarding analysis
description: Comparison of 5 competitor onboarding flows. Our flow has fewer steps but competitors have higher completion rates.

title: CI/CD pipeline coverage report
description: Pipeline covers dev, staging, and production environments. All deployment steps automated with rollback capability.

title: Cross-browser test results
description: Tested on Chrome, Firefox, Safari desktop. Mobile testing limited to iOS Safari and Chrome Android. 2 layout issues found on small screens.

title: Auth provider SLA document
description: SLA guarantees 99.9% uptime. Actual March uptime was 99.7% due to incidents.
